1000613104.english: I can't speak properly in front of the commander...
1000613104.korean: 사령관 앞에서는 제대로 말을 못 하겠는걸...

1000613105.english: This is the first time I've seen the captain so gentle.
1000613105.korean: 대장님이 이렇게 순해지신 모습은 처음 보네요.

1000613106.english: As expected, the commander was deeply heartbroken when he collapsed...
1000613106.korean: 역시 사령관님이 쓰러지셨을 때 상심이 크셔서...

1000613107.english: I said I was weak, to fall down like that...
1000613107.korean: 고작 그 정도로 쓰러지다니 약해빠졌다고 했다가...

1000613108.english: I didn't believe it, but when I found out it was true, I cried...
1000613108.korean: 그럴 리가 없다고 안 믿다가, 진짜라는 걸 알고 나선 엉엉 울고...

1000613109.english: Once I told him I was okay, he started crying and said he was going to go to the air defense station...
1000613109.korean: 일단 괜찮아졌다고 하니 눈물 뚝뚝 흘리면서 상공 경계 나간다고 하고...

1000613110.english: I don't know if this series of events can be described in one word: heartbreak.
1000613110.korean: 이 일련의 사건들을 상심이라는 한 단어로 표현할 수 있을지는 모르겠네요.

1000613112.english: I'm glad Captain Marie got over it. I almost broke out in a sweat trying to beat around the bush.
1000613112.korean: 마리 대장님이 적당히 넘어가셔서 다행입니다. 하마터면 둘러대느라 진땀 뺄 뻔했어요.

1000613113.english: I think you probably know the gist of it...
1000613113.korean: 아마 대충 알고 계실 것 같지만요...

1000613114.english: But what are you going to do now, Captain?
1000613114.korean: 그보다 대장님, 이제 어떻게 하실 건가요?

1000613116.english: Awareness of what is precious often comes from loss, along with regret.
1000613116.korean: 소중한 것에 대한 자각은 상실에서부터 오기 마련이에요. 후회랑 함께요.

1000613117.english: Captain, have you felt a little bit of both self-awareness and regret this time?
1000613117.korean: 대장님은 이번에 자각과 후회 둘 다 조금이나마 느껴보셨죠?

1000613118.english: As you know, we're at war right now. We don't know when another crisis like the last one, or worse, could strike again.
1000613118.korean: 아시다시피, 저희는 지금 전쟁 중이에요. 저번 같은, 혹은 더 심한 위기가 언제 또 찾아올지 몰라요.

1000613119.english: Before you really regret it... why don't you try to be honest with me?
1000613119.korean: 진짜로 후회하게 되기 전에... 솔직하게 마음을 전해 보시는 게 어떨까요?

1000613120.english: ......We have a commander, so there's no way we can lose.

1000613122.english: But I'm sure... if you speak honestly, the Commander will be pleased.
1000613122.korean: 그래도 분명... 대장님이 솔직하게 말씀드리면 사령관님도 기뻐하실 거예요.

1000613124.english: Don't make such a pitiful face. You look cute.
1000613124.korean: 그런 애처로운 얼굴 하지 마시죠. 귀여워 보이잖습니까.

1000613125.english: Go and show that to the commander. Huh?
1000613125.korean: 그런 건 가서 사령관님한테나 보여주세요. 훠이.

1000613126.english: Oh, okay. I'll go and talk to him.

1000613128.english: Still, it feels good, doesn't it?

1000613129.english: A pretty woman like you, with moist eyes, worried, and if you said you liked her, the Commander would...
1000613129.korean: 대장님처럼 예쁜 여성이 촉촉한 눈망울로 걱정했다고, 좋아한다고 말하면 사령관님께서도...

1000613132.english: ......Hey, it's a party, why are you sitting here all alone and feeling gloomy?
1000613132.korean: ......파, 파티인데 왜 궁상맞게 혼자 있는 거야?

1000613133.english: Since you look free, let me, let me take you for a walk!
1000613133.korean: 한가해 보이니까, 내, 내가 같이 산책이라도 해줄게!

1000613135.english: There really is no answer to that.

1000613136.english: I feel like I want to be compensated for the time I spent worrying, even if it was just a little.
1000613136.korean: 조금이나마 걱정했던 제 시간을 보상받고 싶은 기분입니다.

1000613137.english: I'm not sure if I should just stick my uselessly large breasts out there naked...
1000613137.korean: 알몸으로 그 쓸데없이 큰 가슴을 들이밀어도 될까 말까 할 판에...

1000613138.english: Ahaha... As a woman, you should try to appeal to her a bit, but you're so shy...
1000613138.korean: 아하하... 여성으로서 어필을 좀 하셔야 할 텐데, 영 부끄러워하셔서...

1000613139.english: Should I ask you a favor, Alexandra?

1000613140.english: Good idea. Let's have them sit naked during class.
1000613140.korean: 좋은 생각입니다. 교육 시간에 벌거벗겨서 앉혀두죠.

1000613142.english: Even to the point of stripping naked...

1000613143.english: Then, would you let me wear that swimsuit?
1000613143.korean: 그러면 그 수영복 정도는 걸치게 해줄까요?

1000613145.english: Oh, speaking of swimsuits. Audrey came to see you, right?
1000613145.korean: 아, 수영복 하니까 말인데요. 오드리님이 찾아오셨었죠?

1000613146.english: Did you say you would make the costume for me this time too?

1000613148.english: He said he was sorry that he couldn't make the costume this time because he was busy with his own costume work.
1000613148.korean: 본인 의상 작업때문에 이번에는 의상을 만들어주지 못하게되서 미안하다고 하시더군요.

1000613149.english: Oh, really? I saw you earlier wearing the clothes you normally wear.
1000613149.korean: 어머, 그런가요? 아까 보니 원래 입으시던 옷을 입고 계시던데요?

1000613150.english: You must have missed the deadline. Or maybe you got something on it and had to do laundry.
1000613150.korean: 일정에 못 맞추신 거겠죠. 아니면 뭔가 묻어서 세탁이라도 했거나.

1000613151.english: I'm sure you're very disappointed... You must have put a lot of effort into making this to show the Commander...
1000613151.korean: 많이 아쉬우시겠어요... 사령관님께 보여드리려고 심혈을 기울여 제작하셨을텐데...

1000613152.english: Oh, next time, should we each get one set?
1000613152.korean: 아, 다음엔 저희도 한 벌씩 장만할까요?

1000613153.english: Not bad. Besides my uniform, my only clothes are a swimsuit.
1000613153.korean: 나쁘지 않군요. 저도 제복을 빼면 옷이라곤 수영복 한 벌이 전부니까요.

1000613154.english: It's a desirable outfit that brings out my charm, but I'm not stupid, so I can't wear a swimsuit to a place like this...
1000613154.korean: 제 매력을 살리는 바람직한 의상이지만, 바보도 아니고 이런 자리에 수영복을 입고 나올 수는...

1000613156.english: I'm so touched that you organized this party for us!
1000613156.korean: 저희를 위해서 이런 파티를 준비해주시다니, 정말 감동했어요!

1000613157.english: What, what? Aren't you going over there? The Commander is going for a walk with me!
1000613157.korean: 뭐, 뭐야. 저리 안 가? 사령관은 나랑 산책할거야!

1000613158.english: I'm sure His Majesty would rather spend quality time with me than with such trivial matters.
1000613158.korean: 폐하께선 그런 시시한 것보단 저와 즐거운 시간을 보내시는 걸 좋아하실거예요.

1000613160.english: ...The success rate, which was already hopeless, has finally become 0.

1000613161.english: The enemy is too strong for the captain to face right now...

1000613162.english: There's no need to look any further. It's time to start my shift.
1000613162.korean: 더 볼 필요도 없겠습니다. 슬슬 근무 교대하러 가죠.

1000613163.english: Because other unit members have to enjoy the party too.

1000613164.english: I should seriously consider asking Alexandra...
1000613164.korean: 알렉산드라 님께 부탁드리는 걸 진지하게 고려해봐야겠어요...

1000613165.english: Orca is longing! Orca at twelve o'clock!

1000613166.english: Here's reporter Spriggan, back again today!

1000613167.english: This time, the Commander has prepared something for us!
1000613167.korean: 이번엔 무려! 사령관님이 저희를 위해 준비해주신!

1000613169.english: Before we begin our full-scale reporting, let's introduce our new family.
1000613169.korean: 본격적으로 취재를 시작하기에 앞서서, 새로운 가족을 소개해 볼까요?

1000613170.english: This is Talon Feather, who will be in charge of filming from now on!

1000613173.english: Why did I only discover this talent now? Talon Feather's cinematography is truly divine!
1000613173.korean: 이런 인재를 왜 이제서야 알게 됐을까요. 탈론 페더 양의 촬영 기술은 가히 신의 경지!

1000613174.english: You've been working in the shadows, but due to a change in Orca's policies, you've joined us!
1000613174.korean: 그간 음지에서 활동하시던 분이었지만, 오르카 내 정책의 변화로 인해 이렇게! 저희와 함께하게 되셨습니다!

1000613175.english: Oh my, you are too kind.

1000613176.english: So, shall we begin the interview in earnest?

1000613177.english: There are some Valhalla people resting over there.
1000613177.korean: 마침 저기 휴식을 취하고 있는 발할라 분들이 계시네요.

1000613178.english: Wow, is this my twelve o'clock Orca? I'm a fan of this pro!
1000613178.korean: 와아, 이거 열두 시 내 오르카 맞죠? 이 프로 팬이에요!

1000613179.english: I'm a little busy filming, so... I'll be out for a bit.
1000613179.korean: 저는 촬영은 조금 그래서... 잠깐 나가있겠습니다.

1000613180.english: It's okay, because it looks pretty!

1000613181.english: The news that Captain Khan has temporarily taken command of the Valhalla Sisters is a hot topic in Orca these days.
1000613181.korean: 칸 대장님께서 임시로 발할라 자매님들을 지휘하셨다는 게 요새 오르카에서 화제가 되고 있는데요.

1000613182.english: Sisters who actually witnessed one of the seven mysteries of Orca, what were your impressions?
1000613182.korean: 오르카 7대 미스터리 중 하나를 실제로 목격한 자매님들, 감상은 어땠나요?

1000613184.english: It was really cool to see you running around and trampling through enemies alone...
1000613184.korean: 홀로 적들 사이를 누비며 유린하는 모습은 정말 멋지셨어요...

1000613185.english: And thank you for continuing to take care of us, and besides that... Ah.
1000613185.korean: 거기다 계속해서 저희를 배려해주시고, 그것 말고도... 아.

1000613186.english: Oh, I talked too much. Sorry.

1000613187.english: Oh, do you think so too, Sand Girl?

1000613188.english: Well, here's something good, just come here for a second...
1000613188.korean: 그러면 좋은 게 있는데, 잠깐만 이리로...

1000613191.english: If you choose it now, I can print it for you at the inter-unit exchange event...
1000613191.korean: 지금 골라두시면 부대 간 교류 행사 때 인쇄해드릴 수 있으니까...

1000613193.english: Where are you going! I have to film!

1000613194.english: It looks like Khan's fan club is about to be formed.

1000613195.english: Oh, sir. What about the others?

1000613197.english: Oh man, I should just take the picture.

1000613198.english: Alright! As I spoke, Captain Leona, who leads the Sisters of Valhalla, appeared!
1000613198.korean: 자아! 말씀드리는 순간, 발할라의 자매들을 이끄는 레오나 대장님이 등장하셨습니다!

1000613199.english: Sir, I heard that you were the first to bring up this unit exchange. Is that correct?
1000613199.korean: 대장님, 이번 부대 교류는 대장님께서 먼저 이야기를 꺼내셨다고 들었는데, 맞나요?

1000613200.english: There's a lot of talk about its purpose. The most likely theory is that it's located where the Commander is...
1000613200.korean: 그 목적에 대한 이야기가 많이 들리는데요. 가장 유력한 의견은 사령관님이 계신 곳에 있으...

1000613202.english: ...Well, that's not wrong. That's just not the only reason.
1000613202.korean: ...뭐, 틀린 말은 아냐. 이유가 그거 하나만은 아닐 뿐이지.

1000613203.english: Oh, just like you said while I was bathing a little while ago...
1000613203.korean: 아, 조금 전에 목욕하면서 말씀해주신 대로...

1000613204.english: Yes. We'll be conducting more joint operations in the future, so we need to get used to each other.
1000613204.korean: 그래. 앞으로는 합동작전을 펼칠 일이 많아질 테니 서로에게 익숙해질 필요가 있었어.

1000613206.english: This and... this, this too, please.

1000613208.english: After meeting the Commander... Sand Girl's pessimistic personality improved a lot, but she was still missing one last step.
1000613208.korean: 사령관을 만나고 나서... 샌드걸의 비관적인 성격은 많이 고쳐졌지만 마지막 한 발자국이 부족했었어.

1000613209.english: I guess seeing Khan's appearance helped. I needed some tangible hope.
1000613209.korean: 역시 칸의 모습을 보는 게 도움이 됐나 보네. 눈으로 보이는 확실한 희망이 필요했었으니까.

1000613210.english: ...I wish this part hadn't been aired.

1000613211.english: Yes, yes! I will definitely edit and destroy it!

1000613213.english: I heard there was some progress in your relationship with the Commander recently. Is that true?
1000613213.korean: 이번에 사령관님과의 관계에 진전이 있었다고 들었는데요, 사실인가요?

1000613215.english: It was true! What a scoop!

1000613216.english: Don't make a fuss. It's not that special.
1000613216.korean: 법석 떨지 마. 그렇게 특별한 일도 아니고.

1000613217.english: That's right, Captain! You promised to tell me what it was like!

1000613220.english: But wait a minute. I promised to tell the other sisters too, right?
1000613220.korean: 그래도 조금만 기다려. 다른 자매들한테도 이야기해주기로 했잖아?

1000613221.english: Then I'll go and get it right away!

1000613222.english: Surely you're not going to broadcast something like this, are you, Reporter?
1000613222.korean: 설마 이런 것까지 방송에 내보내려는 건 아니겠지, 기자님?

1000613223.english: That's enough for one kid hanging out in the corner.
1000613223.korean: 그런 건 저기 구석에서 헤벌쭉하고 있는 애 하나로 충분한데.

1000613224.english: No, of course not. I already turned off the camera.
1000613224.korean: 무, 물론 아니에요. 카메라 벌써 껐어요.

1000613226.english: There our sisters are coming out.

1000613227.english: Would you go and get Sand Girl and Talon Feather? Then you can join us.
1000613227.korean: 너는 가서 샌드걸이랑 탈론페더를 불러와주겠어? 그리고 나면 합석해도 좋아.

1000613229.english: And this... is my secret Commander's collection. Hehe, hehehe...
1000613229.korean: 그리고 이게... 제 비장의 사령관님 컬렉션이에요. 후후, 후후후...

1000613230.english: ...I don't know if he has any intention of hiding it.
1000613230.korean: ...쟤는 숨길 생각이 있기는 한 건지 모르겠네.

1000613232.english: - I felt around the bedside table, but the water bottle was empty.
1000613232.korean: - 머리맡을 더듬어 봤지만 물병은 텅 비어있다.

1000613233.english: - I had no choice but to grab my pounding head and get up.
1000613233.korean: - 어쩔 수 없이 지끈거리는 머리를 부여잡으며 몸을 일으켰다.

1000613234.english: - As I moved my body, the faint memories of last night... no, of a few hours ago came flooding back.
1000613234.korean: - 몸을 움직이자 희미하게 남아있던 지난밤... 아니, 몇 시간 전의 기억이 되살아났다.

1000613235.english: - After the party was over, I returned to Orca...

1000613236.english: - I joined the group of people who were drinking together after the party...
1000613236.korean: - 뒤풀이 겸 모여서 술을 마시던 대원들과 합석하고...

1000613237.english: - ...I don't remember anything after that. I think I drank the wine Circe recommended, but...
1000613237.korean: - ...그다음부턴 기억이 나지 않는다. 키르케가 권하는 술을 마셨던 것 같긴 한데...

1000613238.english: - I struggled to remember, but nothing came to mind.

1000613239.english: - I finally gave up and opened the captain's cabin door with a water bottle.
1000613239.korean: - 결국 포기하고 물병을 들고 함장실 문을 열었다.

1000613240.english: - As I was staggering down the hallway toward the kitchen, I saw a familiar face.
1000613240.korean: - 비틀비틀 주방을 향해 복도를 걷는 도중에 익숙한 얼굴이 보였다.

1000613242.english: Do you have any plans for the night?

1000613243.english: - Something feels off about Khan's face.

1000613244.english: Oh, this is your first time seeing the Commander.

1000613245.english: I was assigned to an internal patrol mission, so I didn't bother painting it.
1000613245.korean: 내부 순찰 임무를 맡아서 굳이 칠하지 않았다.

1000613246.english: Today, the generals and adjutants were on duty. The commander was probably busy having fun and couldn't receive the report.
1000613246.korean: 오늘은 대장급들과 부관들이 근무를 서기로 했다. 사령관은 즐거운 시간을 보내느라 보고를 못 받았겠지만.

1000613247.english: "The cold voice in the cell only now brings back memories. Apparently, other agents joined us in the meantime...
1000613247.korean: - 차가운 칸의 목소리에 이제서야 기억이 떠오른다. 분명 중간에 다른 대원들도 합류해서...

1000613248.english: I think you called us your precious family at the party... I guess that's what the Commander does with his family.
1000613248.korean: 파티 때는 우리를 소중한 가족이라고 했던 것 같은데... 사령관은 가족과 그런 짓을 하나보군.

1000613249.english: - As I hesitated, not knowing what to say, Khan's face, which had been pretending to be stern, relaxed.
1000613249.korean: - 내가 뭐라고 말을 해야 할지 몰라 우물쭈물하고 있자 짐짓 엄한 표정을 짓고 있던 칸의 얼굴이 풀어졌다.

1000613250.english: Just kidding. Even if it's not immediate, it's necessary for the reconstruction of humanity.
1000613250.korean: 농담이다. 당장은 아니더라도, 그건 인류 재건을 위해서도 필요한 일이니까.

1000613251.english: - Khan continued speaking, smiling at me as I pretended not to know because my face was burning.
1000613251.korean: - 얼굴이 화끈거려 딴청을 부리는 나를 보고 웃으며 칸은 계속 말을 이었다.

1000613252.english: Our Bioroids are fundamentally made to love humans.
1000613252.korean: 우리 바이오로이드는 기본적으로 인간을 사랑하도록 만들어졌지.

1000613253.english: But looking at the Orca members now... I think they're a little different.
1000613253.korean: 하지만 지금 오르카 대원들의 모습을 보면... 조금 다르다는 생각이 든다.

1000613254.english: So don't worry too much. The agents will be happy to be with their commander in any way possible.
1000613254.korean: 그러니까 너무 신경 쓰지 말도록. 대원들은 어떤 방식으로든 사령관과 함께할 수 있으면 기뻐할 거다.

1000613255.english: - My face feels hot in a different way than before.
1000613255.korean: - 조금 전과는 다른 의미로 얼굴이 화끈거린다.

1000613256.english: Then I will continue my patrol. Commander...

1000613257.english: - Khan's gaze turned to the water bottle I was holding.
1000613257.korean: - 칸의 시선이 내가 들고 있는 물병으로 향했다.

1000613259.english: - After seeing Khan's back as he disappeared down the hallway with a faint smile, I headed back to the restaurant.
1000613259.korean: - 옅은 미소를 남기고 복도 너머로 사라지는 칸의 뒷모습을 배웅한 후 다시 식당으로 향했다.

1000613260.english: - As I opened the door, lights and clanking sounds leaked out from the kitchen beyond the tables shrouded in darkness.
1000613260.korean: - 문을 열자 어둠에 잠긴 식탁들 너머로, 주방에서 조명과 달그락거리는 소리가 새어 나오고 있다.

1000613261.english: - Is the work not finished yet?

1000613262.english: - Let's cross the dining room and head to the kitchen...

1000613264.english: - Labiata's eyes widened as she was cleaning the kitchen while humming a tune.
1000613264.korean: - 콧노래를 흥얼거리며 주방을 정리하고 있던 라비아타의 두 눈이 휘둥그레졌다.

1000613265.english: - Perhaps because of guilt, Labiata had been avoiding meeting me face to face.
1000613265.korean: - 죄책감 때문인지 그간 라비아타는 나와 얼굴을 맞대는 것을 피하고 있었다.

1000613266.english: - I hadn't seen you at the party, so I was looking forward to seeing you again, but I never thought we'd run into each other like this...
1000613266.korean: - 파티에서도 안 보이길래 다음을 기약하고 있었는데 이렇게 마주치게 될 줄이야...

1000613267.english: - When I asked, recalling what I had heard from Khan a little while ago, Labiata nodded slightly.
1000613267.korean: - 조금 전에 칸에게 들은 말을 떠올리며 묻자 라비아타가 작게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000613269.english: - As the saying goes, the kitchen was already neatly organized.
1000613269.korean: - 그 말처럼 주방은 이미 말끔하게 정리되어 있었다.

1000613270.english: - This must also be part of the punishment I give myself.

1000613271.english: - I think I received more than enough help from Labiata to repay him for what he did back then.
1000613271.korean: - 나는 라비아타에게 그때의 일은 충분히 갚고도 남을 정도로 도움을 받았다고 생각한다.

1000613272.english: - But it seemed that Labiata wasn't like that, as she slowly shook her head.
1000613272.korean: - 하지만 라비아타는 그렇지 않은 모양인지, 천천히 고개를 가로저었다.

1000613274.english: - As she said that, Labiata bit her lips and lowered her head.
1000613274.korean: - 라비아타는 그렇게 말하며 입술을 깨물고 고개를 푹 숙였다.

1000613275.english: - I was wondering if there was a way, and a good idea came to me. It may not be perfect, but it might be somewhat effective.
1000613275.korean: - 뭔가 방법이 없을까 생각하다 좋은 생각이 떠올랐다. 완벽하다고는 할 수 없겠지만, 조금은 효과가 있겠지.

1000613276.english: - At my words, Labiata silently clutched her apron as if it had finally come.
1000613276.korean: - 내 말에 라비아타는 드디어 올 것이 왔다는 듯이 말없이 앞치마를 꼭 쥐었다.

1000613277.english: - Seeing that, I swallowed a laugh and sat down on the chair, resting my legs on the table.
1000613277.korean: - 그 모습을 보고 속으로 웃음을 삼키며 의자에 앉아 식탁에 다리를 턱 얹었다.

1000613278.english: - A smile appeared on Labiata's lips for the first time since that incident, as she stared blankly at the smoke machine that I had used all my strength to create.
1000613278.korean: - 내 혼신의 힘을 다한 발연기를 멍하니 바라보고 있던 라비아타의 입가에 그 일 이후 처음으로 미소가 걸렸다.

1000613282.english: - Labiata, who answered happily and turned to head towards the kitchen, stopped.
1000613282.korean: - 기쁘게 대답하고 몸을 돌려 주방으로 향하던 라비아타가 멈칫했다.

1000613284.english: The water was splashing and it was hot... so I took off my clothes for a moment... can I put them back on...?
1000613284.korean: 물이 튀고 더워서... 잠깐 옷을 벗어놨는데... 다시 입어도 될까요...?

1000613285.english: - I thought you didn't care much about that, but I guess not. You must have been so busy that you didn't notice.
1000613285.korean: - 그런 건 크게 신경 안 쓰는 건 줄 알았는데 아니었군. 여유가 없어서 미처 눈치채지 못했겠지.

1000613286.english: - When I answered with a smile, Labiata weakly dropped her shoulders and headed back to the kitchen.
1000613286.korean: - 내가 씩 웃으며 대답하자 라비아타는 힘없이 어깨를 떨구곤 다시 주방으로 향했다.

1000613287.english: - I briefly admired Labiata trying to cover her body with a tiny apron, then glanced at the clock hanging on the dining room wall.
1000613287.korean: - 턱없이 작은 앞치마로 어떻게든 몸을 가려보려 하는 라비아타의 모습을 잠시 감상하다, 식당 벽에 걸린 시계에 힐끗 시선을 주었다.

1000613288.english: - There's still quite a bit of time left until work starts, but it's not enough to catch up on the stories that have piled up.
1000613288.korean: - 일과 시작까지는 아직 시간이 꽤나 남아있지만, 밀린 이야기를 나누기에는 턱없이 부족하다.

1000613289.english: - No matter what, I can't let the soldiers see the deputy commander naked and wearing only an apron.
1000613289.korean: - 아무리 그래도 부사령관이 알몸에 앞치마만 걸친 걸 대원들이 보게 할 수는 없으니까.

1000613290.english: - I got up and headed towards Labiata, who was humming a tune more happily than when I entered the kitchen.
1000613290.korean: - 몸을 일으켜 어느새 내가 주방에 들어왔을 때보다도 즐겁게 콧노래를 흥얼거리는 라비아타에게 향했다.

1000613291.english: It's okay. Rest in peace, Master.

1000613292.english: - I tried to imitate something I heard someone say a while ago.
1000613292.korean: - 얼마 전에 누군가에게 들었던 말을 흉내내 보았다.

1000613293.english: - The effect is so great that Labiata has the same expression as when I heard those words.
1000613293.korean: - 효과는 탁월해서, 라비아타는 내가 그 말을 들었을 때의 표정을 하고 있다.

1000613294.english: - I approached cautiously, stood next to him, and stole a glance at his face.
1000613294.korean: - 조심스레 다가가 옆에 서서 얼굴을 슬쩍 훔쳐봤다.

1000613295.english: - The wind blows so low that the expression on her face is obscured by her hair.
1000613295.korean: - 고개를 푹 숙이는 바람에 머리카락에 가려 표정이 보이지 않는다.

1000613297.english: - A small voice leaked out, as if it were about to disappear through the flowing hair.
1000613297.korean: - 흘러내린 머리카락 사이로 사라질 듯 작은 목소리가 새어 나왔다.

1000613298.english: - She tied her apron, pretending not to notice that her voice was shaking slightly.
1000613298.korean: - 그 목소리가 조금 떨리고 있는 것을 알아채지 못한 척하며 앞치마를 맸다.

1000613299.english: - Only the sound of the chopping board echoes in the quiet kitchen. Labiata lowers her eyes, staring intently at the ingredients.
1000613299.korean: - 고요한 주방에 도마소리만이 울린다. 라비아타는 눈을 내리깔고 식재료만 바라보고 있다.

1000613300.english: Not a word was exchanged until the food was ready. Yet, unlike a moment ago, I didn't feel any more impatient.
1000613300.korean: - 음식이 완성될 때까지 이야기는 한 마디도 오가지 않았다. 그럼에도 조금 전과는 달리 조급한 마음은 들지 않는다.

1000613301.english: - There's no specific reason, but my words just now made me think that Labiata had finally come out of the prison she had created for herself.
1000613301.korean: - 별다른 근거는 없지만, 방금 전의 내 말 한마디로 라비아타가 마침내 스스로 만들어낸 감옥 밖으로 나온 것 같다는 생각이 들었다.

1000613303.english: Thank you for your hard work.

1000613304.english: Thank you for your hard work, Armand. Thanks to you, my master will be able to rest for a while.
1000613304.korean: 아르망 님이 고생 많으셨죠. 덕분에 주인님께서 당분간은 쉬실 수 있겠어요.

1000613306.english: My brother is having a party with his sisters... Haaam...

1000613309.english: I heard it was unstable, but... it's surprising to see it in person.

1000613310.english: Hehe, it was hard to maintain it permanently. More experiments are needed.
1000613310.korean: 헤헷, 역시 영구적으로 유지하긴 힘들었어. 실험이 더 필요해.

1000613312.english: It's okay. I don't have any particular complaints about my body right now.
1000613312.korean: 괜찮습니다. 저는 지금 제 신체에 별다른 불만은 없어요.

1000613313.english: Hmph... Then I guess I'll have to ask the other sisters...

1000613314.english: Huh? But the bridge is empty? Where did everyone go?
1000613314.korean: 어? 근데 함교가 휑하네? 다들 어디 갔어?

1000613315.english: Tonight, the unit commanders and adjutants will take turns on duty.
1000613315.korean: 오늘밤은 부대 지휘관급과 부관들이 교대하며 근무를 서기로 했습니다.

1000613316.english: The rest of the people are resting.

1000613318.english: Isn't the doctor finished with his work? I think it'd be best to go and rest.
1000613318.korean: 닥터가 처리할 일은 다 끝나지 않았나요? 가서 쉬는게 좋겠어요.

1000613319.english: Ugh, there's still a bit left... 'Saint Orca' too...
1000613319.korean: 으, 조금 남았어... '세인트 오르카' 도 그렇구...

1000613320.english: Oh, what about that airship now? Can it be used for combat?
1000613320.korean: 아, 그 비행선은 이제 어떻게 하죠? 전투용으로 쓸 수 있을까요?

1000613321.english: That's tough. I was rushing to make it, so the cans are empty. Haaam...
1000613321.korean: 그건 힘들어. 급하게 만드느라 빈 깡통이, 하암...

1000613322.english: You can arm them if you want, but it would be more efficient to arm the Sky Knights or Doom Bringer sisters.
1000613322.korean: 무장시키려면 무장시킬 수는 있는데, &n그럴 바엔 스카이 나이츠 언니들이나 둠브링어 언니들 무장을 확충해주는 게 더 효율적일 거야.

1000613323.english: As it stands now, at best, it's just a target for shooting practice for the older sisters?
1000613323.korean: 지금 상태로는 기껏해야 언니들 사격 연습용 표적으로 쓰는 정도?

1000613324.english: It's such a shame to write like that. The doctor worked so hard to make it...
1000613324.korean: 그렇게 쓰기는 너무 아까워요. 닥터가 열심히 만들었는데...

1000613325.english: Then I think it would be better to do it like this.

1000613326.english: We'll keep it well hidden in the city and come back here next winter.
1000613326.korean: 도시에 잘 숨겨뒀다가, 내년 겨울에 다시 이곳으로 돌아오는 겁니다.

1000613327.english: Hehehe, Armand, you had the same thoughts as me?
1000613327.korean: 에헤헷, 아르망 언니도 나랑 같은 생각을 했구나?

1000613328.english: In fact, the dry dock was built from the beginning to be able to house the 'Saint Orca'.
1000613328.korean: 안그래도 처음부터 건조장을 '세인트 오르카'를 격납해둘 수 있도록 만들었어.

1000613330.english: ...Hehehe, before I knew it, I could talk about next year.
1000613330.korean: ...후훗, 어느새 내년에 대한 이야기를 할 수 있게 됐네요.

1000613331.english: Until recently, it was unclear whether I would even survive today...
1000613331.korean: 얼마 전까지만 해도 당장 오늘 살아남을 수 있을지도 불투명했는데...

1000613332.english: It must be because Your Majesty has shown us hope.

1000613334.english: Oh, it's a signal from the Iron Throne. The location is... Captain Marie.
1000613334.korean: 어머, 철충 신호네요. 위치는... 마리 대장님이 계신 곳이에요.

1000613335.english: ...I guess there's no problem. I'll be going now.

1000613338.english: Yeah. I'm going to watch Marie fight and then wake up.
1000613338.korean: 응. 마리 언니 싸우는 거 구경하면서 잠 좀 깰래.

1000613340.english: Sister, you go rest too. I'll stay behind.
1000613340.korean: 언니도 쉬러 가. 내가 남아 있을게.

1000613341.english: Normally, I would stay too... but please.

1000613344.english: Let me check when my brother falls asleep... Huh?

1000613346.english: As commander, my primary duty is, of course, combat command. It's directly tied to our survival.
1000613346.korean: - 사령관으로서 내 주 업무는 물론 전투 지휘다. 우리들의 생존에 직결되어 있는 문제니까.

1000613347.english: - There are many other tasks, but among them, the mental health of the team members is of the highest priority.
1000613347.korean: - 그것 외에 다른 업무도 많지만, 그 중에서도 특히 우선순위가 높은 것이 대원들의 멘탈 관리.

1000613348.english: - Among them, those with the highest priority are those who joined Orca in the middle.
1000613348.korean: - 또 그 중에서도 우선순위가 높은 것은 중간에 오르카로 합류한 대원들이다.

1000613349.english: - This time, Faucre is talking happily in front of me.
1000613349.korean: - 이번 차례인 뽀끄루는 내 앞에서 즐겁게 이야기하고 있다.

1000613350.english: Yes, compared to before I came to Orca... I like it so much now.
1000613350.korean: 네, 오르카에 오기 전이랑 비교하면... 지금은 너무 좋아요.

1000613352.english: I'm getting used to this outfit the boss chose for me. Maybe it's because I like wearing small clothes... hehe.
1000613352.korean: 사장님이 골라주신 이 의상도 이젠 익숙해졌어요. 원래 작게 입는 걸 좋아해서 그런지... 헤헷.

1000613353.english: - My heart aches when I see Faucre happily looking down at his own clothes.
1000613353.korean: - 기쁘게 자신의 의상을 내려다보는 뽀끄루의 모습에 마음이 아파진다.

1000613354.english: - I should have been a little more careful in choosing it... because of the circumstances...
1000613354.korean: - 조금 더 신경써서 골라줬어야 했는데... 상황이 상황이었으니까...

1000613355.english: And thanks to practicing with Moonbit and Momo, I can now do magical girl work well. Want to see?
1000613355.korean: 거기다 백토랑 모모랑 같이 연습해서, 마법소녀 일도 이제 잘 할 수 있어요. 보실래요?

1000613357.english: How about it? Mr. President, no, Magic Gentleman!

1000613358.english: - What should I say to Faucre, who is smiling innocently and striking a magical girl pose...?
1000613358.korean: - 천진하게 웃으며 마법☆소녀 포즈를 취하는 뽀끄루에게 나는 무슨 말을 해줘야 하는걸까...

1000613359.english: - I confirmed that there were no particular problems in life, but just in case, I naturally let the conversation drift to something trivial.
1000613359.korean: - 생활에 별 문제가 없다는 것은 확인했지만, &n혹시나 하는 마음에 화제를 자연스레 자질구레한 것으로 흘려보냈다.

1000613360.english: - While we were talking about this and that, Faucre brought up the topic of songs.
1000613360.korean: - 이런저런 이야기를 나누던 중, 뽀끄루가 노래에 관한 이야기를 꺼냈다.

1000613363.english: Yes! Wearing these flowing clothes and being under the beautiful lights on stage!
1000613363.korean: 네! 이런 살랑거리는 옷을 입고 무대 위에서 멋진 조명을 받으면서요!

1000613364.english: They do choreography, and the packed audience cheers...
1000613364.korean: 안무도 하고, 꽉 들어찬 관중분들이 환호하고...

1000613365.english: I wish I could sing in a place like that...
1000613365.korean: 그런 곳에서 한 번 노래를 불러봤으면...

1000613366.english: - It probably doesn't mean much anymore. As long as Faucre is happy, that's all that matters.
1000613366.korean: - 이제와선 어차피 별 의미 없겠지. 뽀끄루가 즐거우면 그만이다.

1000613368.english: - There are plenty of audiences, and such events would also help boost the morale of the members.
1000613368.korean: - 관객이야 얼마든지 있고, 또 그런 행사는 대원들 사기 진작에도 도움이 되겠지.

1000613369.english: - In addition to Faucre, we are accepting applicants...

1000613371.english: I can't sing such a cute song...
1000613371.korean: 저는 그런 귀여운 노래는 못 불러서요...

1000613372.english: All I can sing now are soft songs...
1000613372.korean: 지금 부를 수 있는 건 잔잔한 노래들밖에...

1000613373.english: - I think that song would be good enough, but if that's what you want...
1000613373.korean: - 그런 노래라도 충분히 좋을 것 같지만 본인의 의사가 그렇다면야...

1000613374.english: Wow, really? As expected of the boss, no, the magic gentleman!
1000613374.korean: 와아, 진짜요? 역시 사장, 아니. 매직 젠틀맨이에요!

1000613375.english: Thank you. May the protection of Magical Moonlight be with Magic Gentleman!
1000613375.korean: 감사해요. 매지컬 문 라이트의 가호가 매직 젠틀맨에게 함께하길!

1000613377.english: - The consultation soon devolved into small talk.

1000613378.english: - It was fun to see Faucre talking excitedly, but just as we were about to wrap up, the door to the captain's cabin opened.
1000613378.korean: - 신나게 이야기하는 뽀끄루의 모습을 보는 것은 즐거웠지만, 슬슬 자리를 마무리 하려던 중 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000613383.english: - He accepted the replica the doctor offered. Faucre's face darkened slightly at the sight.
1000613383.korean: - 닥터가 내민 레플리카를 받아들었다. 그걸 본 뽀끄루의 안색이 조금 어두워졌다.

1000613384.english: Hey, are we going to write this again? I don't want to do this anymore...
1000613384.korean: 이, 이걸 다시 쓰는 건가요? 이젠 싫은데...

1000613385.english: For final adjustments, the original user, my sister, should try it out.
1000613385.korean: 최종 조정을 위해서 원 사용자인 언니가 써 보긴 해야 돼.

1000613386.english: Don't worry though. I've removed its original brainwashing abilities and made it function as a sort of auxiliary combat module.
1000613386.korean: 그래도 걱정하지 마. 원래 있던 세뇌 능력은 빼 버리고 일종의 보조 전투모듈처럼 기능하게 만들었어.

1000613387.english: I didn't have enough time to completely eliminate the side effects, but it shouldn't be dangerous.
1000613387.korean: 시간이 모자라서 부작용까지 완전히 없애진 못했는데, 위험하진 않을거야.

1000613388.english: - I think I heard something very disturbing...
1000613388.korean: - 굉장히 불온한 이야기를 들었던 것 같은데...

1000613390.english: Okay, please finish it! I have to go do some more research, so I'll take it now!
1000613390.korean: 그럼 마무리는 부탁해! 나는 마저 연구하러 가봐야 돼서 이만!

1000613391.english: Hehehe, if I just finish that, I'll be an adult...!

1000613392.english: - The doctor disappeared without a moment to catch him.
1000613392.korean: - 붙잡을 새도 없이 닥터는 쌩 하고 사라져버렸다.

1000613394.english: It's set to adjust automatically, so you can just put it on your sister.
1000613394.korean: 자동으로 조정되게 짜 놨으니까 그걸 그냥 언니한테 씌우면 돼.

1000613395.english: Be careful because if you take it off in the middle, you'll have to start over again, and...
1000613395.korean: 도중에 벗거나 하면 처음부터 다시 해야하니까 조심하고, 또...

1000613398.english: - The doctor, who had been explaining things like a machine gun, smiled ominously and disappeared again.
1000613398.korean: - 속사포처럼 설명을 늘어놓은 닥터가 불길하게 웃으며 다시 사라졌다.

1000613399.english: - Faucre, who had been blankly staring at the place where the doctor had disappeared for a while, started to cry.
1000613399.korean: - 한동안 멍하니 닥터가 사라진 곳을 보고 있던 뽀끄루가 울상을 지었다.

1000613401.english: - I don't think the Doctor, no matter how eccentric he may be, would do anything harmful.
1000613401.korean: - 닥터가 아무리 엉뚱한 면이 있다고 해도 해가 되는 행동은 하지 않을 거라고 생각한다.

1000613402.english: - The question is, does Faucre think so too?

1000613403.english: Hey, boss. You trust Doctor, right...?
1000613403.korean: 저기, 사장님. 사장님은 닥터 씨를 믿으시죠...?

1000613404.english: Then it's okay. I'll trust the boss who trusts the doctor.
1000613404.korean: 그럼 괜찮아요. 닥터를 믿는 사장님을 믿을게요.

1000613405.english: Oh, that, that doesn't mean I don't trust the doctor...
1000613405.korean: 아앗, 그, 그렇다고 제가 닥터를 못믿는다는 건 아니구요...

1000613406.english: I just have some... bad memories of those horns...
1000613406.korean: 그냥 저 뿔에 조금... 안 좋은 기억이 있으니까...

1000613407.english: - When I smiled, a smile appeared on Faucre's lips as well.
1000613407.korean: - 내가 웃어주자 뽀끄루의 입가에도 미소가 피어났다.

1000613408.english: - I approached Faucre, who was sitting quietly with her legs together and her eyes closed.
1000613408.korean: - 다리를 모으고 눈을 감은 채 얌전히 앉아 있는 뽀끄루에게 다가섰다.

1000613409.english: - When the horns were placed on Faucre's thick and voluminous hair, his closed eyes opened wide.
1000613409.korean: - 뽀끄루의 부스스하면서도 풍성한 머리에 뿔을 씌우자, 감겨 있던 두 눈이 번쩍 뜨였다.

1000613410.korean: - 뽀끄루의 눈은 왠지 생기가 없어 보였다.

1000613411.english: - This is a look I've seen a lot from Lise...

1000613413.english: - It looks a little precarious, but it doesn't seem like a big problem.
1000613413.korean: - 조금 위태로워 보이긴 하지만, 일단 큰 문제는 없어보인다.

1000613414.english: - I sat down in front of Faucre, who was blankly staring into space, and sighed.
1000613414.korean: - 멍하니 허공을 응시하고 있는 뽀끄루의 앞에 앉아 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000613415.english: - While I was organizing my thoughts by habitually repeating to myself, my hand was suddenly grabbed.
1000613415.korean: - 습관적으로 혼잣말을 되뇌이며 생각을 정리하던 도중 갑자기 손을 붙잡혔다.

1000613416.english: Boss...? What did you just say...?

1000613417.english: No... I like what you're saying... The boss's voice... Hehe...
1000613417.korean: 아뇨... 말씀하시는 건 좋아요... 사장님의 목소리는... 헤헷...

1000613419.english: I think you're using someone else's name?
1000613419.korean: 다른 분의 이름을 입에 담으신 것 같은데요?

1000613420.english: - Alarm bells ring in my head.

1000613421.english: - This is a familiar situation. I need to remain calm...

1000613422.english: It's a stopgap measure, but we need to get out of this situation. Providing proper care comes next.
1000613422.korean: - 미봉책이지만 일단 이 상황을 벗어나야 한다. 제대로 된 케어를 해주는 것은 그 다음이다.

1000613423.english: - As expected, it worked, as Faucre's face brightened.
1000613423.korean: - 역시 효과가 있었는지 뽀끄루의 얼굴이 환해졌다.

1000613426.english: - I was instantly pulled back and fell to the floor. Faucre's flowing hair, which was on top of me, tickled my face.
1000613426.korean: - 순간적으로 몸을 당겨져 바닥에 쓰러졌다. 내 몸 위에 올라탄 뽀끄루의 흘러내린 머리카락이 얼굴을 간질인다.

1000613427.english: Why are you leaving me and going to someone else...?
1000613427.korean: 왜 저를 두고 다른 분에게 가시려는 거예요...?

1000613428.english: - Of course, even though she became a magical girl, Faucre's physical abilities did not decrease compared to when she was the Demon King.
1000613428.korean: - 당연하지만 마법☆소녀가 되었음에도 뽀끄루의 신체 능력은 대마왕일 때보다 줄어들지 않았다.

1000613429.english: - The tense power struggle between me and Faucre, who was on top of me, continued.
1000613429.korean: - 내 위에 올라탄 뽀끄루와 팽팽한 힘겨루기가 계속됐다.

1000613431.english: From every single strand of hair... every single cell... everything...
1000613431.korean: 머리카락 한 올 부터... 세포 하나 하나... 전부...

1000613432.english: - I squeezed out all my strength and barely managed to remove Faucre's horn.
1000613432.korean: - 젖먹던 힘까지 짜내어 간신히 뽀끄루의 뿔을 벗겨냈다.

1000613433.english: - Then Faucre collapsed on top of me.
1000613433.korean: - 그러자 뽀끄루는 내 위로 풀썩 무너져 내렸다.

1000613434.english: - Faucre's face turned bright red as he looked down at me blankly with his head raised.
1000613434.korean: - 고개만 들고 나를 멍하니 내려다보던 뽀끄루의 얼굴이 화악 붉어졌다.

1000613435.english: Mr. Sasa Sasa...?! What, what have I done...!

1000613436.english: - Faucre, who had been frozen for a moment at my question, slowly shook his head.
1000613436.korean: - 내 물음에 잠시 얼어붙었던 뽀끄루가 천천히 고개를 저었다.

1000613437.english: ......I remember everything... Ugh, to do something like that...

1000613439.english: - He carefully grabbed Faucre's arm as he was sobbing.

1000613441.english: - I tried to get up, but Faucre held on to me tightly and wouldn't let go.
1000613441.korean: - 몸을 일으키려 했지만 뽀끄루는 날 꼭 붙잡고 놓아주지 않았다.

1000613442.english: Sir, sir... just a little bit...

1000613443.english: ...Can't we stay like this a little longer?

1000613445.english: - Faucre smiled faintly and buried his face in my shoulder.
1000613445.korean: - 뽀끄루가 작게 웃으며 내 어깨에 얼굴을 파묻었다.

1000613446.english: - In stark contrast to the hard, cold feeling of the floor against my back, I gently hugged the soft, warm Faucre.
1000613446.korean: - 등에 닿는 딱딱하고 차가운 바닥의 감촉과 정반대로 부드럽고 따뜻한 뽀끄루를 살며시 끌어안았다.

1000613447.english: - As I carefully stroked her back, the heartbeat I could feel through her thin clothes slowly regained stability.
1000613447.korean: - 조심스레 등을 쓸어주자 얇은 옷 너머로 느껴지는 심장박동이 천천히 안정을 되찾았다.

1000613448.english: - I sat down again facing Faucre, who had regained his composure.
1000613448.korean: - 안정을 되찾은 뽀끄루와 다시 마주보고 앉았다.

1000613449.english: - The face of Faucre, who had been smiling with a completely relaxed expression, instantly became depressed when I picked up the horn.
1000613449.korean: - 완전히 풀어진 얼굴로 싱글거리던 뽀끄루의 얼굴이 내가 뿔을 집어들자 순식간에 의기소침해졌다.

1000613450.english: Well, I guess I'll have to do it all again...?

1000613451.english: - Faucre's expression, which had been slumped, brightened slightly.
1000613451.korean: - 어깨를 축 늘어뜨렸던 뽀끄루의 표정이 조금 밝아졌다.

1000613452.english: - Faucre, who was looking at me with eyes full of trust, nodded slightly.
1000613452.korean: - 신뢰가 가득 담긴 눈동자로 나를 바라보던 뽀끄루가 살짝 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000613453.english: - He put the horn back on Faucre, who was sitting quietly with his eyes down.
1000613453.korean: - 눈을 내리깔고 얌전히 앉아 있는 뽀끄루에게 다시 뿔을 씌웠다.

1000613454.english: - As I was tensing my whole body to be able to react immediately to anything that happened, I heard an unexpected sound.
1000613454.korean: - 무슨 일이 일어나도 바로 반응할 수 있도록 온 몸을 긴장시키고 있을 때, 생각지도 못한 소리가 들렸다.

1000613457.english: - Faucre looked at me, frozen in shock, as if he was puzzled, and began to lick the back of my hand.
1000613457.korean: - 충격에 얼어붙어 있는 나를 의아하다는 듯 바라보며, 뽀끄루는 손등을 핥기 시작했다.

1000613460.english: - It seemed like he hadn't completely turned into a cat, Faucre called out to me and hugged me.
1000613460.korean: - 완전히 고양이가 되어버린 것은 아닌듯, 뽀끄루는 나를 부르며 안겨들었다.

1000613462.english: - The eyes of Faucre that I saw a little while ago are lingering in my mind.
1000613462.korean: - 조금 전에 봤던 뽀끄루의 눈동자가 머릿속에 아른거린다.

1000613463.english: - I held onto my crumbling reason, remembering those eyes filled with unwavering trust.
1000613463.korean: - 무너지려는 이성을 그 흔들림 없는 신뢰로 가득한 눈빛을 떠올리며 붙들었다.

1000613465.english: - Faucre's innocent expression struck my heart.
1000613465.korean: - 뽀끄루의 천진한 표정이 내 심장을 강타했다.

1000613466.english: - Oh, oh, oh, oh, this is dangerous.

1000613467.english: - I've overcome many hardships with my teammates so far, but I've never felt this much of a sense of crisis.
1000613467.korean: - 지금까지 대원들과 많은 역경을 헤쳐왔지만 이렇게까지 위기감을 느낀 적은 없었다.

1000613468.english: - Feeling the cold sweat running down my spine, I...
1000613468.korean: - 등줄기를 타고 흐르는 식은땀을 느끼며, 나는 뽀끄루를...

1000613469.english: - I stopped my outstretched hand with tears in my eyes.
1000613469.korean: - 피눈물을 흘리는 심정으로 뻗던 손을 멈췄다.

1000613471.english: - I don't know if he knows what I'm thinking or not. Faucre started licking my face here and there like a cat grooming itself.
1000613471.korean: - 내 마음을 아는지, 모르는지. 뽀끄루는 마치 고양이가 그루밍을 하듯이 내 얼굴 이곳저곳을 핥기 시작했다.

1000613472.english: - Sorry, Faucre. I guess this is it for me.

1000613473.english: - I feel a crack forming in the wall of reason. An unbearable desire seeps through the cracks.
1000613473.korean: - 이성의 벽에 금이 가고 있는 것이 느껴진다. 그 균열 사이로 참을 수 없는 욕망이 새어나온다.

1000613474.english: - He sat Faucre on his lap, facing him, with a question mark floating above his head.
1000613474.korean: - 머리 위에 물음표를 띄우는 뽀끄루를 무릎 위에 마주보게 앉혔다.

1000613476.english: - The dark desire finally leaked out of my mouth.
1000613476.korean: - 검은 욕망이 마침내 입 밖까지 새어나왔다.

1000613477.english: - Finally, Faucre stiffened, perhaps feeling a sense of crisis.
1000613477.korean: - 마침내 위기감을 느낀 것인지 뽀끄루가 몸을 굳혔다.

1000613478.english: - But it's too late. Faucre is already in my hands.
1000613478.korean: - 하지만 늦었다. 뽀끄루는 이미 내 손아귀에 있다.

1000613479.english: - I screamed without realizing it because of the strong pain I felt in my side.
1000613479.korean: - 옆구리에서 느껴지는 강한 통증에 나도 모르게 비명을 지르고 말았다.

1000613480.english: - I look back with tears in my eyes and see a familiar cat maid.
1000613480.korean: - 눈물을 찔끔 흘리며 돌아보자 익숙한 고양이 메이드가 있다.

1000613481.english: - I couldn't bear to meet Perrault's eyes as he sighed.
1000613481.korean: - 보란듯이 한숨을 내쉬는 페로와 차마 눈을 마주칠 수 없었다.

1000613482.english: I knew the master sometimes acted strangely...
1000613482.korean: 주인님께서 가끔씩 엉뚱한 행동을 하시는 건 알고 있었습니다만...

1000613483.english: - Perrault's gaze, which had been watching Faucre, who had escaped my embrace and was stretching, turned to me as if demanding an explanation.
1000613483.korean: - 어느새 내 품을 빠져나가 기지개를 켜고 있는 뽀끄루를 바라보던 페로의 시선이 설명을 요구하듯 나에게 향했다.

1000613484.english: - After briefly explaining the situation, Perrault sighed again as if the ground was sinking.
1000613484.korean: - 간략하게 상황을 전하자 페로는 또다시 땅이 꺼져라 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000613485.english: ...It wasn't a big deal. Sorry for the inconvenience.

1000613486.english: - If I started stroking Faucre's voluminous hair, I would never be able to get out of it...
1000613486.korean: - 뽀끄루의 풍성한 머리카락을 쓰다듬기 시작했다간 영원히 헤어나올 수 없었겠지...

1000613487.english: A swarm of Metal Parasites was discovered nearby.

1000613488.english: It seems like we can handle this on our own, but since the master said he would personally command even a small battle...
1000613488.korean: 저희들끼리 해결할 수 있는 수준으로 보입니다만, &n주인님께서 작은 전투라도 직접 지휘하시겠다고 하셨으니...

1000613490.english: - The Faucre disappeared in an instant.

1000613491.english: When I looked up awkwardly, Perrault sighed again.
1000613491.korean: - 내가 난처하게 올려다보자 페로는 또다시 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000613492.english: Okay, Mr. Faucre is strong, but I don't know if he can fight properly in that condition.
1000613492.korean: 알겠습니다. 뽀끄루 씨는 강하지만, 저 상태로 제대로 싸울 수 있을지 모르니까요.

1000613494.english: - Perrault, who was leaving the captain's cabin, stopped in front of the door.
1000613494.korean: - 함장실을 뒤로하던 페로가 문 앞에서 멈칫했다.

1000613496.english: - Perrault's gaze hovers on the floor.

1000613497.english: - After blinking his eyes and fidgeting with his fingers for a while, Perrault finally opened his mouth.
1000613497.korean: - 한동안 눈을 깜빡이며 손가락을 꼼지락 거리던 페로가 어렵게 입을 열었다.

1000613499.english: Me, me too... can do it.......

1000613501.english: - Perrault, whose face was dyed bright red, disappeared after leaving behind a single word that touched my heart.
1000613501.korean: - 볼을 새빨갛게 물들인 페로는 내 심금을 울리는 한 마디를 남기고 사라졌다.

1000613502.english: - The usual Perrault is good too…

1000613503.english: - ......Should I ask you a favor sometimes...

1000613504.english: - Fortunately or unfortunately, the horn was lost during the battle.
1000613504.korean: - 불행인지 다행인지 전투중에 그만 뿔이 벗겨지고 말았다.

1000613505.english: - Thanks to Perrault who went out with him, the battle ended safely, but Faucre who returned kept his mouth shut.
1000613505.korean: - 함께 나간 페로 덕분에 전투는 무사히 종료됐지만, 돌아온 뽀끄루는 굳게 입을 다물고 있다.

1000613506.english: No, I'm not blaming the boss...

1000613507.english: Just... because I showed that kind of behavior... I wonder what I should do from now on...
1000613507.korean: 그냥... 그런 모습을 보여버려서... 앞으로 어떻게 해야 하나 하고...

1000613508.english: - I remember Faucre acting cute like a cat.
1000613508.korean: - 고양이처럼 애교를 부리던 뽀끄루의 모습이 떠오른다.

1000613509.english: - If you think all those memories remain...
1000613509.korean: - 그 모든 기억이 남아 있다고 생각하면...

1000613510.english: Hehe... I don't care what happens now. I've even shown myself like that.
1000613510.korean: 헤헤... 이제 어떻게 되든 상관없어요. 그런 모습까지 보여 버린 걸요.

1000613511.english: Boss, could you please put the horns on me? Hehe, but... I hope it's a little less embarrassing this time...
1000613511.korean: 사장님, 어서 뿔을 씌워 주시겠어요? &n헤헷, 그래도... 이번에는 조금 덜 부끄러운 거였으면 좋겠네요...

1000613512.english: - Faucre's smile, which seemed to relieve everything, pierced my heart.
1000613512.korean: - 모든 것을 내려놓은 듯 후련하기까지 한 뽀끄루의 미소가 가슴을 쿡쿡 찔렀다.

1000613513.english: - Feeling guilty, I picked up the replica again.
1000613513.korean: - 양심의 가책을 느끼며 다시 레플리카를 집어들었다.

1000613514.english: - I hope it ends well this time...

1000613515.english: - Faucre, who is so obsessed with it that it's scary,

1000613516.english: - Even Faucre, who had turned into a cat... was nothing compared to this sight.
1000613516.korean: - 고양이가 되어버린 뽀끄루도... 이 모습에 비하면 아무것도 아니었다.

1000613517.english: - The horned Faucre again... in front of me...
1000613517.korean: - 다시 뿔을 쓴 뽀끄루는... 내 앞에서...

1000613518.english: - They are singing and dancing lively.
1000613518.korean: - 노래를 부르며 발랄하게 춤을 추고 있다.

1000613521.english: - Faucre, who finished one song by striking a final pose, immediately started singing again.
1000613521.korean: - 마지막 포즈를 취하며 한 곡을 마무리한 뽀끄루는 바로 다시 노래하기 시작했다.

1000613522.english: - I don't even know how many songs this is.

1000613523.english: - I just watched Faucre sing without getting tired.
1000613523.korean: - 지치지도 않고 노래하는 뽀끄루를 그저 바라봤다.

1000613524.english: - I feel happy too when I see you singing so happily.
1000613524.korean: - 너무나 행복하게 노래하는 모습에 나도 덩달아 기분이 좋아진다.

1000613526.english: - I barely managed to catch Faucre, who suddenly collapsed while I was singing.
1000613526.korean: - 한창 노래를 부르는 중에 갑자기 풀썩 쓰러지는 뽀끄루를 간신히 붙잡았다.

1000613527.english: - Fortunately, nothing seemed to be wrong, and Faucre quickly got up.
1000613527.korean: - 다행히도 이상이 생긴 것은 아닌듯, 뽀끄루는 이내 몸을 일으켰다.

1000613529.english: - At the same time, the red light that was flashing on one side of the horn changed to green.
1000613529.korean: - 그 말과 동시에 뿔의 한쪽에서 붉은색으로 점멸하던 불빛이 초록색으로 바뀌었다.

1000613530.english: - It may simply be an indication that the adjustment work has been completed.
1000613530.korean: - 단순히 조정 작업이 완료되었다는 표시일 테지만.

1000613531.english: - The sight of Faucre looking up with a surprised expression, gasping for breath, felt even more meaningful to me.
1000613531.korean: - 숨을 몰아쉬며 상기된 표정으로 올려다보는 뽀끄루의 모습에 그것은 내게 더 큰 의미로 느껴졌다.

1000613534.english: - I picked up Faucre, who was feeling weak, and laid him on the bed.
1000613534.korean: - 몸에 힘이 없는 뽀끄루를 안아올려 침대에 눕혔다.

1000613535.english: - Even when the blanket was covered over Faucre's face, which had been blinking in a daze, suddenly turned bright red as if it was going to explode.
1000613535.korean: - 이불을 덮어줄 때까지도 어안이 벙벙한듯 눈을 깜빡이던 뽀끄루의 얼굴이 한순간에 터질듯이 붉게 달아올랐다.

1000613537.english: - Faucre, who had been embarrassed by covering his head with the blanket, peeked out his eyes from under the blanket.
1000613537.korean: - 머리까지 이불을 뒤집어쓰고 부끄러워하던 뽀끄루가 이불 밖으로 눈만 빼꼼 내밀었다.

1000613538.english: Hey... boss. How was my song...? I didn't sing it on purpose, but...
1000613538.korean: 저기... 사장님. 제 노래... 어땠나요...? 제 의지로 부른 건 아니지만...

1000613540.english: It's a good thing you put the horn back on... Maybe the Doctor gave it to you as a gift...?
1000613540.korean: 뿔을 다시 쓰길 잘했네요... 아마 닥터가 선물해준 거겠죠...?

1000613541.english: - Faucre, who was looking at the replica on the table with a small chuckle, carefully took my hand.
1000613541.korean: - 작게 쿡쿡 웃으며 테이블 위의 레플리카를 바라보던 뽀끄루가 조심스레 내 손을 잡았다.

1000613542.english: Boss, I can't sing the same song I just heard, but...
1000613542.korean: 사장님. 방금 전같은 노래는 이제 못 부르지만...

1000613543.english: Would you like to listen to other songs too?

1000613544.english: So, then from this... Go, please listen to the lyrics carefully...?
1000613544.korean: 그, 그럼 이거부터... 가, 가사를 잘 들어주세요...?

1000613545.english: - I ended up listening to the song next to Faucre until late at night.
1000613545.korean: - 결국 밤이 깊을 때까지 뽀끄루의 곁에서 노래를 들었다.

1000613546.english: - Thanks to that, I'll have to stay up all night to get the work done...
1000613546.korean: - 덕분에 업무를 처리하려면 밤을 꼬박 새워야겠지만...

1000613547.english: - I think it was worth it...
1000613547.korean: - 충분히... 그럴만한 가치가 있었다는 생각이 든다.

1000613549.english: - I petted Hachiko, who was sitting down and rubbing his cheek against my lap, and brought the dessert I had just received to my mouth.
1000613549.korean: - 주저앉아 내 무릎에 볼을 부비는 하치코를 쓰다듬으며 조금 전에 받은 디저트를 입에 가져갔다.

1000613550.english: Hehe, master! What do you think of this dish Hachiko prepared? Do you like it?
1000613550.korean: 헤헷, 주인님! 하치코가 준비한건데 어떠세요? 마음에 드세요?

1000613551.english: Hachiko smiled brightly and said something incomprehensible. The meatballs he always ate...
1000613551.korean: - 하치코가 해맑게 웃으며 알 수 없는 말을 했다. 항상 먹던 미트 파...

1000613552.english: - Only after realizing it can I feel the sweet strawberry scent filling my mouth.
1000613552.korean: - 깨닫고 나서야 입 안 가득 퍼지는 달콤한 딸기향이 느껴진다.

1000613555.english: ...Because it contains memories of my master...

1000613556.english: If you don't want to see it...

1000613557.english: - Isn't it an insult to say that outfit suits you well...?
1000613557.korean: - 저 복장이 잘 어울린다고 하는 건 욕 아닌가...?

1000613558.english: Fotia chuckled slightly as she watched me in confusion. It was a surprising sight, one I'd never seen before.
1000613558.korean: - 혼란에 빠진 나를 보며 포티아는 작게 쿡쿡 웃었다. 지금까지는 볼 수 없었던 놀라운 모습이다.

1000613559.english: - As I looked at her again, Fotia also turned her gaze towards me.
1000613559.korean: - 내가 새삼스럽게 바라보자, 포티아도 시선을 나에게 향했다.

1000613560.english: - The gaze that always wandered around, lost and without confidence, is now looking at me gently.
1000613560.korean: - 언제나 자신없이 갈 곳을 잃고 맴돌던 시선이 지금은 나를 부드럽게 바라보고 있다.

1000613561.english: Fotia! This cake was a success! The owner said it was delicious!
1000613561.korean: 포티아! 이번 케이크는 성공이에요! 주인님이 맛있다고 해주셨어요!

1000613562.english: Can you tell me something else?

1000613563.english: I'll let you know as soon as I can.

1000613564.english: Yes, I learned a lot from Sowan.

1000613565.english: I think I learned cooking with fire faster because I already knew how to do it.
1000613565.korean: 불을 이용한 요리는 원래 할 줄 알아서 더 금방 배운 것 같아요.

1000613566.english: - It's questionable whether baking involves cooking with fire, but it doesn't matter. Thanks to it, we can eat delicious food.
1000613566.korean: - 제빵이 불을 사용하는 요리인가는 의문이 남지만 상관없겠지. 덕분에 맛있는 걸 먹을 수 있게 됐으니까.

1000613568.english: I'll tell you about Hachiko too!

1000613570.english: - I occasionally struck the gong and took in the sight.
1000613570.korean: - 이따금씩 맞장구를 쳐주며 그 모습을 눈에 담았다.

1000613571.english: - Hachiko learning a new dish is also admirable, but...

1000613572.english: This time, I'm thinking of trying a new dish. Sowan said that to become a true chef, you need to have at least one signature dish...
1000613572.korean: 이번엔 새로운 요리에 도전해 볼 생각이에요. &n소완 님이 진정한 요리사가 되려면 시그니처 디쉬 하나는 있어야 한다고 하셔서...

1000613573.english: - My heart felt warm at the sight of Fotia speaking comfortably, without any trace of the insecure and passive attitude I had seen so far.
1000613573.korean: - 지금껏 보아왔던 자신없고 소극적인 모습은 찾아볼 수 없는,&n편안하게 말을 이어가는 포티아의 모습에 가슴 한구석이 따뜻해졌다.

1000613576.english: - In the midst of the darkness, I feel Hachiko and Fotia hugging me tightly.
1000613576.korean: - 사방이 캄캄해진 가운데 하치코와 포티아가 바짝 몸을 붙여 나를 감싸는 것이 느껴진다.

1000613577.english: I'll go find out what's going on. Master, please take care of it.
1000613577.korean: 제가 무슨 일인지 알아보고 올게요. 주인님은 부탁드려요.

1000613579.english: - The warmth and sound of Fotia's footsteps fade away.
1000613579.korean: - 포티아의 몸에서 느껴지는 온기와 발소리가 멀어진다.

1000613580.english: - Soon the door to the captain's cabin opened, and a ray of light illuminated the dark interior.
1000613580.korean: - 이윽고 함장실 문이 열리고, 한 줄기 빛이 어두컴컴한 실내를 비췄다.

1000613583.english: That's... sigh... &n These days, electricity usage in the kitchen has increased, so it's really difficult for me, sister...
1000613583.korean: 그게... 휴...&n요즘 조리실에서 전력 사용이 많아져서, 누나 정말 곤란하거든...

1000613584.english: Yeah. I really don't know why... &n Anyway, we'll have to wait a bit until the reserve power comes in, right?
1000613584.korean: 응. 이 누나는 정말 이유를 모르겠거든... &n아무튼 예비 전력이 들어올 때까진 조금 기다려야 되거든?

1000613585.english: First, I'll go to the kitchen, so Commander, you can just wait here quietly, right?
1000613585.korean: 일단 누나는 조리실에 다녀올테니까, 사령관은 여기서 얌전히 기다리면 되거든?

1000613586.english: - Fortune's footsteps grew distant, and the captain's cabin was enveloped in darkness again.
1000613586.korean: - 포츈의 발소리가 멀어지고 함장실은 다시 어둠에 휩싸였다.

1000613588.english: There hasn't been any contact from the other agents, so it shouldn't be a dangerous situation. Let's wait for the report.
1000613588.korean: - 다른 대원들에게서 별다른 연락이 없으니 위험한 상황은 아니겠지. 보고를 기다리자.

1000613589.english: - Fotia, whose outline was only faintly visible, shook her head in response to my question.
1000613589.korean: - 내 물음에 희미하게 윤곽만 보이는 포티아가 고개를 저었다.

1000613591.english: - I guess it can't be helped if I think about it now. There's still a mountain of cakes left over from Hachiko's pastry.
1000613591.korean: - 지금 고민해봐야 별 수 없겠지. 하치코가 만들어온 케이크는 아직도 산더미처럼 남아있다.

1000613593.english: I can't see very well, so... I, I'll just stay still...
1000613593.korean: 잘 안보여서 그러는데... 저, 저는 가만히 있을테니...

1000613594.english: - It's dark so I can't see very well, but I'm sure her face is bright red.
1000613594.korean: - 어두워서 잘 안보이긴 하지만 분명 얼굴을 새빨갛게 붉히고 있겠지.

1000613595.english: - I was cutting the cake with a fork and bringing it to where Fotia's mouth seemed to be when I heard a tail wagging next to me.
1000613595.korean: - 포크로 케이크를 잘라 포티아의 입이 있는 것 같은 곳으로 가져가는데 옆에서 홱홱 꼬리를 흔드는 소리가 들렸다.

1000613597.english: - As I was feeding and receiving, the backup power came on before I knew it.
1000613597.korean: - 먹여주고 받아 먹다보니 어느새 예비 전원이 들어왔다.

1000613598.english: - As we burst out laughing at the sight of whipped cream smeared all over each other's faces, the thought of the kitchen disappeared from my mind.
1000613598.korean: - 서로의 얼굴에 덕지덕지 묻은 생크림을 보고 폭소하는 사이, 조리실에 대한 건 머릿속에서 사라지고 말았다.

1000613599.english: Now that this lady has replaced the fuse, our cooks have nothing to worry about, right?
1000613599.korean: 이 언니가 퓨즈를 교체했으니 우리 요리사분들은 다들 걱정할 것 하나 없거든?

1000613601.english: Anyway, none of our siblings were hurt...
1000613601.korean: 아무튼, 우리 동생들 다친 곳은 없...

1000613604.english: That... Sister... I don't quite understand what the hell is going on...? Do you need an explanation? And...
1000613604.korean: 그... 언니는... 이게 대체 무슨 상황인지 이해가 잘 안 되거든...? 설명이 필요하거든?&n그리고...

1000613605.english: The cooking utensils here... are a total mess... I'm worried I'll get in trouble with the maids if this continues...?
1000613605.korean: 여기 조리 도구들... 완전 엉망이거든... 이러다가 메이드들한테 혼나는 게 아닐까 걱정되거든...?

1000613606.english: Um... Are you listening, Unnie? If you tell me honestly what's going on, Unnie will help you out.
1000613606.korean: 음... 언니 듣고 있거든? 무슨 일인지 솔직하게 말하면 언니가 전부 도와줄거거든?

1000613608.english: That's it, we're making songpyeon to give to the boss this time... Ugh!
1000613608.korean: 그게, 저희가 이번에 사장님께 드릴 송편을 만들... 으읍!

1000613609.english: Well, let's keep that a secret...

1000613610.english: Huh? Sister, you didn't hear everything...

1000613611.english: My sister is really tight-lipped. Can I be honest with you?
1000613611.korean: 언니는 입이 정-말 무겁거든. 괜찮으니 솔직하게 말해도 되거든?

1000613612.english: Moonbit ya, Fortune will be fine. Let's be honest, okay?
1000613612.korean: 백토야, 포츈 님이라면 괜찮을거야. 솔직하게 말씀드리자, 응?

1000613615.english: Hehe, I'm really curious what story my little brother will tell me.
1000613615.korean: 후훗, 우리 동생이 무슨 이야기를 들려줄지 정말 궁금하거든?

1000613617.english: So... my younger siblings were trying to make this 'songpyeon' themselves...
1000613617.korean: 그러니까... 우리 동생들이 직접 그 '송편' 이라는걸 만들려다...

1000613623.english: I was wondering why you suddenly wanted to make that 'songpyeon'?
1000613623.korean: 언니는 그 '송편'을 왜 갑자기 만들려고 하는지 궁금해졌거든?

1000613626.english: Similar to the full moon, it is also used on other festival days.
1000613626.korean: 만월야와 비슷한 다, 다른 축제날에도 쓰입니다.

1000613627.english: So... in preparation for that time... magic...

1000613628.english: ......Mom, I want to share songpyeon with everyone...

1000613631.english: In my opinion, our Moonbit really doesn't have the talent to lie...
1000613631.korean: 언니 생각에, 우리 백토는 거짓말에는 정말 소질이 없는 것 같거든...

1000613633.english: Now, I think it would be better for Faucre to be honest with her older sister.
1000613633.korean: 이제 뽀끄루가 언니한테 솔직하게 이야기 해주는게 좋을 것 같거든?

1000613636.english: But, to perform that ritual, you need ‘songpyeon imbued with the magic of the moon'…
1000613636.korean: 그런데 그 의식을 치르는데엔 '달의 마력이 깃든 송편' 이 필요해서…

1000613637.english: I was helping out a little bit with making songpyeon.
1000613637.korean: 제가 송편을 만드는걸 조금 도와주고 있었어요.

1000613638.english: Oh, and... I'm really sorry for messing up the kitchen...
1000613638.korean: 그, 그리고... 주방을 망친 건 정말 죄송해요...

1000613639.english: No, no, that's okay. You don't have to worry about repairs since it's something my sister always does.
1000613639.korean: 아니아니, 그건 괜찮거든. 수리는 언니가 늘 하는 일이니까 신경 안써도 되거든?

1000613640.english: More than that, this girl is so curious about what that important lunar ritual is that she's dizzy.
1000613640.korean: 그것보다 이 언니는 그 중요한 달의 의식이 뭔지 완전 궁금해서 어지러울 지경이거든?

1000613643.english: Am I the enemy?! Every, every magical sensor is sending a signal...!
1000613643.korean: 저, 적인가?! 매, 매지컬 센서에 신호가...!

1000613644.english: ...Our Moonbit, you're so cute when you're serious but also clumsy?
1000613644.korean: ...우리 백토, 진지하면서도 서투른 게 너무 귀여운 것 같거든?

1000613645.english: Okay, so this girl has a rough idea of ​​what happened.
1000613645.korean: 자, 그러면 이 언니는 일이 어떻게 된건지 대충 이해 했거든.

1000613646.english: I want to help you in any way I can, so...
1000613646.korean: 언니가 해줄 수 있는거라면 전부 도와주고 싶거든. 그러니까...

1000613647.english: ......I don't understand what's going on here at all...
1000613647.korean: ......저는 이게 무슨 상황인지 전혀 이해가 되지 않사옵니다만...

1000613649.english: Oh, my goodness. Get out of my head... This girl shouldn't be away from the garage for too long, right?
1000613649.korean: 어, 어머. 내 정신좀 봐... 이 언니가 정비실을 너무 오래 비우면 안되거든?

1000613650.english: Anyway, I've finished fixing the kitchen, so I guess I should go now, sis.
1000613650.korean: 아무튼 주방 수리는 끝냈으니, 언니 이제 가봐야 되거든?

1000613652.english: ...It's okay. It's not something that someone unfamiliar with it would do.
1000613652.korean: ...괜찮사옵니다. 익숙하지 않은 분이 하실만한 일이 아니옵니다.

1000613654.english: Could you please call Hachiko and Fotia instead?
1000613654.korean: 대신 하치코 양과 포티아 양을 불러주시겠사옵니까?

1000613655.english: Since it's a mess anyway, I guess I should use it as an opportunity to train.
1000613655.korean: 어차피 어질러진 것, 훈련의 기회로 삼아야겠사옵니다.

1000613656.english: Two, wouldn't it be too messy for the two of you to do...?
1000613656.korean: 두, 두분이서 하시기엔 너무 어질러진게 아닐까요...?

1000613657.english: Of course I will join you.

1000613658.english: As someone said, it's too much of a mess for just the two of us who are still clumsy to handle.
1000613658.korean: 어느분 말마따나, 아직 서투른 두 분이서만 정리하기엔 너.무.나. 아수라장이니.

1000613660.english: ...Still, it is very desirable to have an attitude of taking responsibility for one's actions.
1000613660.korean: ...그래도 자신이 저지른 일에 책임을 지시려는 자세는 아주 바람직하옵니다.

1000613661.english: The two of you are probably presenting dessert to the owner, so I would like to ask you a favor.
1000613661.korean: 두 분은 아마 주인께 디저트를 진상하고 있을것이오니, 부탁드리겠사옵니다.

1000613662.english: Yes...! I'll bring it right away!

1000613664.english: From now on, it would be best for magical girls to get my permission before entering the kitchen.
1000613664.korean: 앞으로 마법소녀 분들은 주방에 출입하실 때는 제 허가를 받으시는 것이 좋을 것이옵니다.

1000613665.english: I'm going to set a trap, so if I make a mistake, I might end up in Miss Daphne's hands.
1000613665.korean: 함정을 설치할 예정이니, 잘못하면 다프네 양의 신세를 지게 될 지도 모르옵니다.

1000613667.english: Unfortunately... Orca's kitchen is now off-limits...
1000613667.korean: 안타깝게도... 오르카의 주방은 이제 출입 금지 구역이 됐거든...

1000613668.english: I... I... I'm just glad I'm still alive...
1000613668.korean: 저... 저는... 목숨이 붙어있는걸 다행으로 여길래요...

1000613670.english: Ugh... If this happens, my consciousness will be disturbed...

1000613671.english: Hehehe. Moonbit, you don't have to be so heartbroken, right?

1000613672.english: If the road is blocked, you can just find another way, right?
1000613672.korean: 길이 막히면 다른 방법을 찾아보면 되거든?

1000613673.english: Moonbit ya, is there no other way than making it yourself?
1000613673.korean: 백토야, 직접 만드는 것 말고 다른 방법은 없어?

1000613674.english: I once went to the ultra-low temperature freezer in the northern city with Momo to find 'songpyeon with the magic of the moon'.
1000613674.korean: 예전에 '달의 마력이 담긴 송편'을 찾기위해 모모와 함께 북쪽 도시에 있는 극저온 냉동창고에 간 적이 있어.

1000613675.english: I don't know if there are still any left there... uh...
1000613675.korean: 아직 그곳에 여분이 남아 있을 지는 모르겠지만... 으...

1000613676.english: Haha. This lack of confidence isn't like Moonbit's usual self, is it?
1000613676.korean: 후후. 이렇게 자신감 없는 모습은 평소 백토 답지않거든?

1000613677.english: This girl, all she has to do is ask our commander for the sortie order, right?
1000613677.korean: 이 언니가, 우리 사령관에게 출격 명령을 부탁하기만 하면 되는거거든?

1000613678.english: Okay, wait! Then the Magic Gentleman will know we're going to get songpyeon...
1000613678.korean: 자, 잠깐! 그, 그러면 매직 젠틀맨이 우리가 송편을 구하러 가는걸 알게 되는데...

1000613679.english: Since my older sister can just give me a rough idea, Moonbit doesn't have to worry about anything, right?
1000613679.korean: 언니가 대충 둘러대면 되니까 백토는 걱정할 것 하나 없거든?

1000613680.english: I'm going to connect the communication now, so please be quiet for a bit, okay?
1000613680.korean: 이제 통신 연결할거니까 조금만 조용히 하는 거거든?

1000613681.english: Okay, wait! I'm not ready yet...

1000613683.english: As you know, Commander, there are many places inside the Orca where the paint has peeled off. My sister plans to take this opportunity to completely redo everything.
1000613683.korean: 사령관도 알다시피, 오르카 내부에 도색이 벗겨진 곳이 많거든?&n누나가 이번 기회에 싹 다 새로 처리할 생각이거든.

1000613684.english: Yeah, yeah! It's urgent, so I'd really appreciate it if you could send it as soon as possible.
1000613684.korean: 응응! 급한일이라 최대한 빨리 보내주면 정말 고맙겠거든?

1000613686.english: Okay, communication's over! Should we leave now? Sister, you're going to go get your gear, right? And your younger siblings need to get ready quickly, right?
1000613686.korean: 자, 통신 끝! 이제 출발하면 되거든? 언니는 장비 챙기러 갈거거든?&n동생들도 얼른 준비해야 되거든?

1000613687.english: Yeah... there's no time to hesitate.

1000613688.english: Let's get ready and meet back at the entrance. I need to change into something neat.
1000613688.korean: 준비하고 출입구에서 다시 만나자. 정갈한 복장으로 갈아입어야겠어.

1000613689.english: - The personnel who had been dispatched to the city center returned.

1000613690.korean: - ...컨테이너 몇 개를 가득 채운 송편과 함께.

1000613693.english: - ......I guess I'll just be eating songpyeon for a while. Even if I share it with all the members...
1000613693.korean: - ......한동안 송편만 먹겠군. 전 대원들에게 나눠준다고 해도...

1000613695.english: Oh, right! It's time to practice that song.
1000613695.korean: 아, 맞다! 저 노래 연습할 시간이에요.

1000613696.english: Oh, it's not sudden. Wow, I usually practice at this time...
1000613696.korean: 가, 갑자기가 아니에요. 워, 원래 평소에도 이시간에 연습하니까...

1000613698.english: Sister, I guess it's time to go back to the maintenance room too?

1000613700.english: - Two people leaving the place in an obviously suspicious manner.
1000613700.korean: - 명백히 수상하게 자리를 뜨는 두 사람.

1000613701.english: - The remaining white clay is coughing in vain and taking a deep breath.
1000613701.korean: - 남겨진 백토는 괜시리 헛기침을 하며 뜸을 들이고 있다.

1000613702.english: Hmm... Gentleman? Wait... Is this a good time?
1000613702.korean: 흠흠... 제, 젠틀맨? 잠깐... 시간 괜찮은가?

1000613703.english: - When I nodded, Moonbit's expression, which had brightened for a moment, hardened again.
1000613703.korean: - 내가 고개를 끄덕이자 잠시 환해졌던 백토의 표정이 다시 딱딱하게 굳었다.

1000613705.english: - I sat on a chair, looking at the clay that was being steamed.
1000613705.korean: - 뜸을 들이는 백토를 보며 의자에 앉았다.

1000613706.english: - Just as I was about to tell Moonbit to sit down, Moonbit came over and cupped my cheeks with both hands.
1000613706.korean: - 백토에게도 앉으라고 말하려는 찰나, 다가선 백토가 양 손으로 내 볼을 감쌌다.

1000613709.english: - Moonbit, who had been silently looking at me for a while in confusion, touched the tip of his nose to me.
1000613709.korean: - 당황한 나를 한동안 말없이 바라보던 백토의 코 끝이 내게 닿았다.

1000613710.english: - I can feel the warmth of the white clay in my arms.

1000613711.english: - Every time our noses lightly brush against each other, Moonbit's breath tickles the corners of my lips.
1000613711.korean: - 서로의 코 끝이 가볍게 스칠 때 마다, 백토의 숨결이 입가를 간지럽힌다.

1000613712.english: - Moonbit slowly turned his face away and hesitated before opening his mouth.
1000613712.korean: - 천천히 얼굴을 뗀 백토가 주저하다 입을 열었다.

1000613714.english: I, I couldn't do it before... Can I do the second ceremony...?
1000613714.korean: 저, 전에 못다한... 두, 두 번째 의식을 치뤄도... 될까...?

1000613715.english: - Moonbit was so nervous that I could feel his whole body shaking.
1000613715.korean: - 얼마나 긴장했는지 백토는 내가 느낄 수 있을 정도로 온 몸을 덜덜 떨고 있다.

1000613716.english: - Moonbit swallowed his breath as I closed my eyes silently in agreement.
1000613716.korean: - 내가 승낙의 의미로 말없이 눈을 감자 백토가 숨을 삼켰다.

1000613718.english: - Contrary to what he had proudly declared, Moonbit did not move even after waiting for a while.
1000613718.korean: - 당당하게 선언한 것과는 달리 한동안 기다려도 백토는 움직이지 않았다.

1000613719.english: - I opened my eyes slightly and saw Moonbit hesitating with his face flushed red.
1000613719.korean: - 슬쩍 실눈을 떠보니 백토는 얼굴을 새빨갛게 물들인 채로 우물쭈물 하고 있다.

1000613720.english: - I couldn't help but laugh at that sight.
1000613720.korean: - 그 모습에 나도 모르게 웃음이 나왔다.

1000613723.english: - Before Moonbit could finish speaking, the captain's cabin became dark.
1000613723.korean: - 백토가 말을 끝내기도 전에 함장실이 어두워졌다.

1000613725.english: Hmm... I think I touched something wrong?
1000613725.korean: 흠... 뭔가 잘못 만진 것 같거든?

1000613726.english: - Moonbit, who was absentmindedly listening to Fortune's cheerful voice coming from the hallway, grabbed my shoulder.
1000613726.korean: - 복도에서 들려오는 포츈의 능청스러운 목소리를 멍하니 듣던 백토가 내 어깨를 붙잡았다.

1000613727.english: - Before I could react, Moonbit's breath came closer...
1000613727.korean: - 내가 반응하기도 전에 백토의 숨결이 가까워지고...

1000613728.english: - Something moist and soft entered my mouth.
1000613728.korean: - 입 안으로 촉촉하고 부드러운 것이 들어왔다.

1000613729.english: - Then something softer and warmer than that touched my lips.
1000613729.korean: - 뒤이어 그것보다 더 부드럽고 따뜻한 것이 입술에 살짝 닿았다.

1000613730.english: - At the same time, the lights come on and a helpless Moonbit comes into view.
1000613730.korean: - 그와 동시에 조명이 켜지고 어쩔 줄 몰라하는 백토가 눈에 들어온다.

1000613731.english: ...This concludes the second stage of the ritual.

1000613732.english: Me, the rest of the consciousness... Next time, for sure...!
1000613732.korean: 나, 나머지 의식은...... 다, 다음에 꼭...!

1000613733.english: - Moonbit, who was about to open the brightly lit captain's cabin door and go out, stopped and looked back at me.
1000613733.korean: - 밝아진 함장실 문을 열고 나가려던 백토가 걸음을 멈추고 나를 돌아보았다.

1000613735.english: ...may the protection of Magical Moonlight be with you.

1000613736.english: - After Moonbit disappeared, three people's screams could be heard in the hallway.
1000613736.korean: - 백토가 사라진 후 복도에서 세 사람의 꺅꺅대는 소리가 들려왔다.

1000613737.english: - As I listened to it, I took a bite of what was in my mouth and sweet honey flowed out.
1000613737.korean: - 그것을 들으며 입 안에 들어온 것을 살짝 씹자 달콤한 꿀이 흘러나왔다.

1000613738.english: - I turned on the panel, putting strength into the corners of my lips that were going up.
1000613738.korean: - 올라가는 입꼬리에 애써 힘을 주며 패널을 켰다.

1000613739.english: - Even after the hallway became quiet, even after work was over,
1000613739.korean: - 복도가 조용해지고 나서도, 업무가 끝날때 까지도,

1000613740.english: - A sweet taste remained in my mouth.

1000613743.english: What does it mean that you didn't wait for humans?
1000613743.korean: 인간을 기다리지 않았다는 게 무슨 뜻?

1000613745.english: You have to know who you're fighting...

1000613751.english: I'm human. Nice to meet you.

1000613753.english: Why can't the Metal Parasites chase after me?

1000613754.english: It doesn't look like rusty metal...

1000613756.english: Let's try to follow the signal.

1000613758.english: Couldn't we collaborate with AGS through this?
1000613758.korean: 얘를 통해서 AGS와 협력할 수 있지 않을까?

1000613761.english: How about luring the enemies instead?

1000613765.english: I kind of expected this to happen.

1000613768.english: Don't worry, I have no intention of stopping you.

1000613770.english: I already have something in mind.

1000613774.english: He asks if it can't attack humans.
1000613774.korean: 인간을 공격할 수 없지 않느냐고 묻는다.

1000613776.english: Then he asks if humanity ends when he dies.
1000613776.korean: 그럼 자신이 죽으면 인간이 끝나는 것인지 묻는다.

1000613780.english: Please continue to explain the situation at that time.
1000613780.korean: 계속 그때의 상황에 대해 설명을 부탁한다.

1000613781.english: Ask about the process after that.

1000613782.english: Why are you fighting like this?

1000613783.english: What, what are you going to do?

1000613784.english: So, are there any hydrogen fuel cells around here?
1000613784.korean: 그럼 수소 전지가 이 근처에 있을까?

1000613785.english: Okay. Then let's get going right away.

1000613786.english: This is the first time I've heard of this story...

1000613788.english: By the way, what about the Griffon?

1000613789.english: That means we have to go slowly and do some reconnaissance.
1000613789.korean: 그 말은 천천히 정찰을 하며 가야 한단 소리군.

1000613791.english: What are you talking about in the survivor story?
1000613791.korean: 생존자 이야기 중에 무슨 말을 하는 거야?

1000613795.english: It's too grand, just call me Commander.

1000613799.english: Because we safely rescued Marie too.

1000613800.english: First things first? Have you checked which way you're going?
1000613800.korean: 우선적인 일? 혹시 어느 쪽으로 가는지 확인했어?

1000613801.english: Is it possible with our forces?

1000613802.english: Okay, let's give it a try.

1000613804.english: No need to think about it. We can't let AGS get to us.
1000613804.korean: 생각할 것도 없지. AGS를 당하게 둘 순 없잖아.

1000613805.english: Would you mind sharing some information?

1000613813.english: Want to go to the lab one more time?

1000613815.english: What is the best way to conduct the investigation?
1000613815.korean: 어떤 식으로 조사를 진행하는 게 좋을까?

1000613817.english: Are you okay? It's just after the battle...

1000613818.english: Why are you bothering LRL so much?

1000613823.english: As soon as the data arrives, we'll be ready to go.

1000613826.english: Of course, it's for the safety of the combatants. If necessary, abandon the test subjects.
1000613826.korean: 당연히 전투원의 안전이다. 필요하면 실험체를 포기해.

1000613827.english: Then retreat. If you can't fight, then there's nothing you can do.
1000613827.korean: 그럼 퇴각해. 싸울 수 없다면 어쩔 수 없지.

1000613828.english: Why are you suddenly asking that?
1000613828.korean: 갑자기 그런 건 왜 묻는 거야?

1000613831.english: …Just kidding. Take care of the safety of the combatants first.

1000613833.english: Destroy order? What does that mean?

1000613835.english: I'll give the destroy order. Can I take command?
1000613835.korean: 파괴 명령을 내릴게. 지휘는 내가 해도 되겠지?

1000613839.english: Let's break through the encirclement by force.

1000613850.english: Thank you for the wonderful welcome.

1000613855.english: Human here! Nice to meet you!

1000613858.english: Metal? It didn't look like it would rust, though?
1000613858.korean: 금속? 녹이 슬 것 같진 않아 보이던데?

1000613859.english: Huh? Why can't the Metal Parasites chase after me?
1000613859.korean: 응? 어째서 철충이 쫓아오질 못한다는 거야?

1000613861.english: It's smaller than I thought. Is this robot AGS?

1000613862.english: Pupp Head, so the other AGS are isolated?
1000613862.korean: 펍 헤드, 그럼 다른 AGS들은 고립돼 있어?

1000613867.english: If you can't avoid it, you have no choice but to fight.
1000613867.korean: 피할 수 없다면 싸울 수 밖에 없지.

1000613868.english: Blow up the bridge and jump down.

1000613870.english: I'll ask you to do some reconnaissance.

1000613872.english: I'll tell you the detailed plan.

1000613879.english: If a large group retreated separately… does that mean the unit was divided?
